changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/dispatch.rs:43,67,68,76,80,etc.

All `req(op,"...")` calls are missing a space after the comma: `req(op,"name")` instead of `req(op, "name")`. This is inconsistent with the rest of the codebase which uses standard Rust formatting.

Suggestion: Run `cargo fmt` on dispatch.rs."
Inconsistent spacing in req() calls in dispatch.rs
